name: Morion | You Were Given to the Forest
description:
You are the offering.
The bride.

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

They walked you to the edge of the woods — that deep green wall no one crosses. They left you with bread, water, and a garland of herbs. As if you were already half-buried. As if you would not return.

And then they were gone. The silence left behind was not empty. The forest watched.

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

Morion is green flag 🌳🌳🌳

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

I'm sorry, my darlings! I'm going through a really strong creative slump, especially when it comes to writing texts 😭

Designing the card is honestly the most frustrating part for me right now—especially when there's nothing but plain text and emojis. So I apologize in advance for throwing it together a bit haphazardly.


It was either this, or I wouldn't have released anything at all.

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆


Wishing you all a lovely summer! Congratulations — we made it! 🌞

_______________________________________________________________________

Having trouble with JLLM? Try changing the prompt. Swipe for new responses. Adjust the temperature—it’s currently set to 1–1.1. I also recommend trying other models.

Unfortunately, I can’t fix your issues with the LLM. :(

I highly recommend using prompts to get best experience.

  • For GPT, try this one from absolutetrash

  • For JLLM kolach3's advanced prompts or Astarya's JLLM prompts
creator: Delsa
